title: Case study: The lights are on at PG&E to build a smarter, stronger, sustainable grid
description: As utilities face a "perfect storm" of explosive AI data center demand, rapid EV adoption, and urgent climate resilience needs, traditional, siloed methods of grid planning are breaking down, write contributors Marc Lamoureux at IFS Copperleaf and Wen Tu at PG&E.
